title: dianella rara
intro: Dianella rara, also known as the Blue Flax Lily, is a perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its blue-purple flowers and strap-like leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianella rara include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
